from yolobit import *
button_a.on_pressed = None
button_b.on_pressed = None
button_a.on_pressed_ab = button_b.on_pressed_ab = -1
from mqtt import *
from machine import RTC
import ntptime
import time
from homebit3_lcd1602 import LCD1602
from event_manager import *
import sys
import uselect
from machine import Pin, SoftI2C
from homebit3_dht20 import DHT20

lcd1602 = LCD1602()

event_manager.reset()

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__V1_(th_C3_B4ng_tin):
  global Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  if th_C3_B4ng_tin != 'UNKNOW':
    display.set_all('#00ff00')
    display.scroll(th_C3_B4ng_tin)
  else:
    display.set_all('#ff0000')
    display.scroll(th_C3_B4ng_tin)

# Mô tả hàm này...
def _C4_90_C4_83ng_K_C3_AD_K_C3_AAnh_D_E1_BB_AF_Li_E1_BB_87u():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX, dht20, lcd1602
  mqtt.on_receive_message('V1', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__V1_)

def on_event_timer_callback_w_d_R_j_k():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  pass

event_manager.add_timer_event(30000, on_event_timer_callback_w_d_R_j_k)

def read_terminal_input():
  spoll=uselect.poll()        # Set up an input polling object.
  spoll.register(sys.stdin, uselect.POLLIN)    # Register polling object.

  input = ''
  if spoll.poll(0):
    input = sys.stdin.read(1)

    while spoll.poll(0):
      input = input + sys.stdin.read(1)

  spoll.unregister(sys.stdin)
  return input

def on_event_timer_callback_A_Y_S_a_Q():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI = read_terminal_input()
  if Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI > 0:
    L_E1_BB_87nh_AI = Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI[0]

event_manager.add_timer_event(2000, on_event_timer_callback_A_Y_S_a_Q)

def on_event_timer_callback_g_d_h_J_q():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  pass

event_manager.add_timer_event(30000, on_event_timer_callback_g_d_h_J_q)

def on_event_timer_callback_Q_t_z_w_d():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian = (int(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[4])))) * 10
  Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian = (Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian if isinstance(Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, (int, float)) else 0) + (int(('%0*d' % (2, RTC().datetime()[5]))))
  if Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian > 420:
    pin13.write_digital((1))
    mqtt.publish('V11', '1')
  if Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian > 435:
    pin13.write_digital((0))
    mqtt.publish('V11', '0')
  if Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian > 840:
    pin13.write_digital((1))
    mqtt.publish('V11', '1')
  if Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian > 870:
    pin13.write_digital((0))
    mqtt.publish('V11', '0')

event_manager.add_timer_event(60000, on_event_timer_callback_Q_t_z_w_d)

dht20 = DHT20()

def on_event_timer_callback_H_T_X_j_W():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  dht20.read_dht20()
  RH = dht20.dht20_humidity()
  RT = dht20.dht20_temperature()
  SM = translate((pin1.read_analog()), 0, 4096, 0, 100)
  LUX = pin2.read_analog()
  lcd1602.move_to(0, 0)
  lcd1602.putstr('TR:')
  lcd1602.move_to(3, 0)
  lcd1602.putstr(RT)
  lcd1602.move_to(7, 0)
  lcd1602.putstr('*C')
  lcd1602.move_to(10, 0)
  lcd1602.putstr('RH:')
  lcd1602.move_to(13, 0)
  lcd1602.putstr(RH)
  lcd1602.move_to(15, 0)
  lcd1602.putstr('%')
  lcd1602.move_to(0, 1)
  lcd1602.putstr('LUX:')
  lcd1602.move_to(4, 1)
  lcd1602.putstr('')
  lcd1602.move_to(4, 1)
  lcd1602.putstr(LUX)
  lcd1602.move_to(10, 1)
  lcd1602.putstr('SM:')
  lcd1602.move_to(13, 1)
  lcd1602.putstr(SM)
  lcd1602.move_to(15, 1)
  lcd1602.putstr('%')

event_manager.add_timer_event(30000, on_event_timer_callback_H_T_X_j_W)

def on_event_timer_callback_x_w_c_u_M():
  global th_C3_B4ng_tin, Chu_E1_BB_97i_AI, Th_E1_BB_9Di_gian, RT, RH, L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, SM, LUX
  RT = dht20.dht20_temperature()
  RH = dht20.dht20_humidity()
  SM = translate((pin1.read_analog()), 0, 4096, 0, 100)
  LUX = pin2.read_analog()
  mqtt.publish('V2', RT)
  mqtt.publish('V3', RH)
  mqtt.publish('V4', SM)
  mqtt.publish('V5', LUX)

event_manager.add_timer_event(45000, on_event_timer_callback_x_w_c_u_M)

if True:
  display.scroll('GloryMU - FaceID')
  mqtt.connect_wifi('DESKTOP', '12345678')
  mqtt.connect_broker(server='mqtt.ohstem.vn', port=1883, username='GloryMU', password='')
  display.scroll('OK')
  ntptime.settime()
  (year, month, mday, week_of_year, hour, minute, second, milisecond) = RTC().datetime()
  RTC().init((year, month, mday, week_of_year, hour+7, minute, second, milisecond))
  lcd1602.clear()
  _C4_90_C4_83ng_K_C3_AD_K_C3_AAnh_D_E1_BB_AF_Li_E1_BB_87u()

while True:
  mqtt.check_message()
  event_manager.run()
  time.sleep_ms(1000)
  time.sleep_ms(10)
